title: add socket information to podman info
body:
this is step 1 to self-discovery of remote ssh connections.  we add a remotesocket struct to info to detect what the socket path might be.

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: man page examples need to be updated.

> man page examples need to be updated.

updated now
